text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Like always, Haru Urara asks to stop by the park
to play on our way home.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Now every time you and I hang out, I feel like I have to go to the park!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I figured enjoying the sunset here would make this
an extra fun day!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After saying those words, she looks up at the late
afternoon sky.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, remember when we played here together?
That was so much fun.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
And the first time we came here, I ended up
falling asleep.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But now, I've gotten super strong. I don't feel
sleepy at all! Heehee!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer. If you're tired, you can nap though!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah, just take it easy! Heehee! Sweet dreams!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I close my eyes for a little, and...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: ...Are you asleep?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee! Fast asleep, I see! Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
There's a thousand carrot cakes... raining from the
sky!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's clearly trying to control my dreams, and I
can't help but chuckle.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What?! You weren't asleep?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey! And here I was gonna give you a piggyback
ride home and everything!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I chuckle and think back to the time I was the one
giving her a piggyback ride. Time sure flies, and
the greatest evidence of that is Haru Urara's
growth.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Together? That means you, too! Okay!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Are you... asleep?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: ...Are you asleep now?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: How... about... now?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
If you are asleep... I'm gonna give you... a
piggyback ride...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems like she's fallen fast asleep herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her body's gotten heavier than before... I guess
she's grown a lot since our first trip to this park.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You're not tired?! Then count carrots! It'll make
you sleepy!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: One carrot, two carrots...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Seven carrots... eight carrots...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Groooowl...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oops. Looks like I made myself hungry...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We decide to head back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I was actually trying to get you to fall asleep so I
could give you a piggyback ride home!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: But I guess I'll have to save that for later!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though her stomach rumbles, she looks
dependable as she promises me a piggyback one
day. As we head back, I can sense how reliable
she's become.
